stemHtml: Is the use of TOGA still possible when the FMS has been set-up for a reduced thrust take-off?

options.a: Yes, TOGA is always possible during a reduced thrust take-off.
options.b: TOGA cannot be selected anymore once the take-off power is set.
options.c: Yes, TOGA is always available when doing a reduced thrust and/or a derated take-off.
options.d: TOGA can only be selected above 100 kt once positive directional control has been established.
